items.title: VI Live: bizarre ontknoping Marokko en mislukte panenka gaat naar verlenging
items.summary: Zondag is het Derby Day in de Eredivisie. We trappen af met de Derby van het Noorden tussen SC Heerenveen en FC Groningen, vervolgen met de Twentse Derby Heracles Almelo - FC Twente en sluiten af met het treffen tussen Feyenoord en Sparta Rotterdam, dat in een apart liveblog wordt behandeld. Verder is er ook buitenlands voetbal. Volg het hier in de VI Live.

items.title: Senegal walk off in Afcon final over controversial penalty
items.summary: Senegal head coach Pape Thiaw ecourages his team off the pitch after hosts Morocco are awarded a controversial stoppage-time penalty in the Africa Cup of Nations final.

items.title: Africa Cup of Nations final descends into chaos as Senegal leave pitch after controversial Morocco penalty – live
items.summary: ⚽ Afcon final updates, 7pm GMT (8pm in Rabat) kick-off ⚽ Jonathan Wilson on this Afcon | Follow us on Bluesky 1 min Peep peep! Morocco, in their white change strip (don’t ask), kick off from right to left as we watch. After a spectacular rendition of the Moroccan anthem, it’s time for the main event: the Afcon 2025 final. Continue reading...

items.title: Feyenoord historisch slechte nummer twee na negentien duels
items.summary: Het was sinds 26 maart 2000 geleden dat Sparta Rotterdam de stadsderby van Nederland nog eens won op vreemde bodem. Destijds was Nourdin Boukhari de held op Zuid. Zondag was het Joshua Kitolano die zich diep in blessuretijd tot de held van Spangen kroonde. Lees hieronder alles terug van wat er op het veld gebeurde.

items.title: Government pulls amendment to Hillsborough law after backlash
items.summary: Proposed change relating to spies was criticised by campaigners and MPs as allowing an opt-out for senior officials The government has pulled an amendment to its proposed Hillsborough law amid concerns from campaigners and MPs that the legislation was being watered down and had become a “car crash” for the government. The public office (accountability) bill aims to force public officials and contractors to tell the truth after disasters. Continue reading...

items.title: Sparta-bus feestelijk onthaald na derbyzege op Feyenoord
items.summary: De Sparta-fans hebben de spelersbus feestelijk onthaald. Na de spectaculaire derbyzege op Feyenoord in de laatste minuut was er volop vreugde in het Sparta-kamp en dat moest natuurlijk uitbundig gevierd worden.

items.title: Vraagtekens bij managementstijl Van Persie: 'Niet zijn tijd en competitie'
items.summary: De managementstijl van Robin van Persie past maar moeizaam in Nederland. Kenneth Perez denkt dat de directe aanpak van de Feyenoord-coach in het buitenland beter uit de verf zal komen.

items.title: 'Arsenal will never forgive themselves if they don't win title now'
items.summary: This is Mikel Arteta and Arsenal's "now or never" moment as Premier League title rivals stumble badly, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

items.title: Saudi Arabia Darts Masters: Draw and schedule with Littler, Van Gerwen in action
items.summary: Draw and schedule from the Saudi Arabia Darts Masters, with Luke Littler, Michael van Gerwen and Luke Humphries all in action.

items.title: Results, fans, fall-outs - factors that lead to managerial pressure
items.summary: From bad results to a clash with a club's owners - BBC Sport takes a look at some of the factors that lead to managers coming under pressure.

items.title: Sparta uitzinnig na zeldzame en spectaculaire overwinning in De Kuip
items.summary: Het was sinds 26 maart 2000 geleden dat Sparta Rotterdam de stadsderby van Nederland nog eens won op vreemde bodem. Destijds was Nourdin Boukhari de held op Zuid . Zondag was het Joshua Kitolano die zich diep in blessuretijd tot de held van Spangen kroonde . De reacties waren euforisch.

items.title: Barry secures deserved win for Everton against Villa
items.summary: Everton's Thierno Barry capitalises on a mistake by Aston Villa's Emi Martinez for a 1-0 win to The Toffees, which stops Villa going second in the Premier League.

items.title: Woltemade struggling to fill Isak void - Hits and misses
Utd's Martinez hits back over 'toddler' criticism
items.summary: Lisandro Martínez has challenged Paul Scholes and Nicky Butt to repeat their criticism to his face after the pair said Erling Haaland would make the Manchester United defender look like "a little toddler" in the Manchester derby.

items.title: Sources: PSG finalizing deal for Barcelona starlet
items.summary: Paris Saint-Germain are finalising the remaining details for the transfer of Dro Fernández, the latest prodigy from Barcelona's academy, sources confirmed to ESPN.

items.title: Arteta: Arsenal denied clear penalty in Forest draw
items.summary: Mikel Arteta has said Arsenal were denied a "very clear penalty" in Saturday's 0-0 draw at Nottingham Forest.

items.title: Wrexham captain McClean exits, joins Derry City
items.summary: Wrexham have announced that their club captain James McLean has moved to Derry City.

items.title: Villa slip vs. Everton in chase to close Arsenal gap
items.summary: Aston Villa's Premier League title ambitions suffered a damaging blow as an 11-game home winning streak ended with a 1-0 defeat to Everton.

items.title: 'Oddest interview I have seen!' | Redknapp and Young bemused by Emery exchange
items.summary: Jamie Redknapp and Ashley Young were left bemused by Unai Emery's post-match interview after Aston Villa's defeat to Everton.

items.title: 'Abandoned' or 'business' - was Glasner right to 'attack' Palace owners?
items.summary: Oliver Glasner's outburst after Crystal Palace were beaten at Sunderland has led to increased speculation over his future at the club but will he be sacked?
